sources.title: They Must Fight to Survive | Invasion Earth | FULL Sci Fi Thriller Horror Film | Movie Central
sources.description:
Invasion Earth | FULL Sci Fi Thriller Horror Film | Movie Central

The story follows a group of addicts who attend therapy to avoid being sent to prison, while a TV journalist goes undercover and joins the group to try and expose this as a scam. However, all of their lives are thrown into chaos by the beginning of an alien invasion.

2016. Stars: Jon-Paul Gates, Johnathan Jules, Steven M. Smith, Phoebe Delikoura | Director: James Twyman | Writer: James Twyman
Licensed from BRI. All rights reserved
